title: Magical Bakery
visualThesis: A warm enchanted patisserie: raspberry and cream walls, honey-gold light, mint accents, glossy icing, soft flour dust, and charming collectible silhouettes that become visibly more luxurious as they merge.
promptProfile: Premium polished casual mobile-game raster art, whimsical chunky 3D illustration, rounded appetizing shapes, tactile pastry materials, warm honey light, raspberry/cream/mint palette, crisp silhouette, no people, no characters, no hands, no text, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no watermark.

prompts.backgroundPortrait: Portrait 9:16 background for a premium casual mobile merge game inside an enchanted patisserie at night. Raspberry paneled walls, cream shelves, honey-gold ovens, mint accents, glowing potion-like baking jars, soft flour sparkle and cozy window light. Keep the central and lower-middle play area calm and low-contrast for a game board overlay. No people, no characters, no collectible items, no interface, no text, no logos. Full-bleed opaque scene, polished whimsical chunky 3D illustration.
prompts.backgroundLandscape: Landscape 16:9 background for the exact same premium casual mobile merge game world: enchanted patisserie at night, raspberry paneled walls, cream shelves, honey-gold ovens, mint accents, glowing baking jars, soft flour sparkle and cozy window light. Keep the central and lower-middle play area calm and low-contrast for a game board overlay. No people, no characters, no collectible items, no interface, no text, no logos. Full-bleed opaque scene, polished whimsical chunky 3D illustration.
prompts.generator: One isolated magical bakery generator for a premium casual mobile merge game: a rounded enchanted stand mixer fused with a tiny glowing oven, cream enamel, raspberry knobs, mint bowl and honey-gold light, front three-quarter view, friendly chunky silhouette. Entire object visible with generous margin. Flat pure chroma green #00FF00 background only, no floor, no people, no characters, no hands, no text, no symbols, no logos.

prompts.chain1Sheet: A strict horizontal sprite sheet with exactly 7 isolated objects in seven equal columns, left to right showing a clearly monotonic pastry progression: 1 plain dough ball, 2 small baked bun, 3 iced cupcake, 4 layered fruit tart, 5 elegant cream cake, 6 ornate celebration cake, 7 spectacular levitating enchanted wedding cake. Same front three-quarter camera, centered one object per column, generous equal margins, nothing crosses a column boundary. Premium chunky casual-game 3D art, raspberry/cream/mint palette. Flat pure chroma green #00FF00 background across the entire sheet. No people, no characters, no text, no labels, no numbers, no logos.
